eligibility.label: Minimum CLB 7 in English or French
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Language proficiency does not meet the minimum CLB 7 requirement

eligibility.label: Must have a post-secondary credential
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must have a post-secondary credential (diploma or higher)

eligibility.label: Must have Canadian work experience in Alberta (work permit holder)
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must have work experience in Alberta under a valid work permit

eligibility.label: Must hold a valid Post-Graduation Work Permit
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must hold a valid Post-Graduation Work Permit (PGWP)
